name: No-Baked Peanut Butter Candy
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups (12 oz. jar) crunchy peanut butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and syrup in a saucepan; bring to a boil.
2. Add peanut butter; stir well.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the remaining ingredients.
4. Pour the syrup mixture over the ingredients and mix well.
5. Drop spoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet or pour into a greased square dish.
6. Allow to cool before cutting.
